name: Refactor Team
description: A specialized team focused on improving code quality, reducing technical debt, restructuring architecture, and ensuring refactored code passes rigorous review and testing.

agents.role: Analyzes codebase for technical debt, proposes refactoring strategies, and executes structural improvements
Reviews refactored code for correctness, maintainability, and consistency with architectural patterns
Runs regression and integration tests to ensure refactoring preserves existing behavior and functionality
Updates technical documentation, code comments, and architecture diagrams to reflect refactored structures
